visa_types.name: Drivers Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
For Ankara Region (Antalya, Ankara), please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view checklist for Ankara region.
In addition to the Ankara Region checklist, please fill out the forms below.
Questionaire Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2AEDdBVr3kJeTgwhtfUWEk/80eea48df8a01c379f4edc5b05a3deca/Questionaire-Form.pdf) 
C-ACCOMMODATION Formu (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5MUGm7TSGIf0DYpbXOOTQH/8052e13af186b96778025828c9ac7e0f/New-C-ACCOMMODATION.pdf)
C-PNR (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/13hNiWhKUVpxzXy24HqlG4/c01b6354f0052c2c9a7cc05407e15806/New-C-PNR.pdf)
Daily Schedule 1 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ngA2IPzFp9PLN5eBa8rpl/a2cd20afdd23854ecfb6fcd00716895e/New_C_Daily_Schedule.pdf)
C-Non Eu Schengen (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5DAiyiWW0U31mCssoY749b/1d89046afd26f06fdd48f30257f03d11/C-NON-EU-SCHENGEN.pdf)
Interview Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64H3cVXkvJgoRkrdva9N8z/b61add67ed2e044a97be5241943d7c92/interview-form-mandatory_english.pdf)
For Istanbul, Izmir please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view the Istanbul, Izmir Checklist.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table: Drivers Visa]
- There is a VFS Service fee of 29 € (inclusive of %20 VAT) levied per application over and above visa fees.
- Important Note : Visa Application Centers do not accept payments with 500 Euros banknotes.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time of visa applications are in discretions of Embassy of Czech
                          Republic in Ankara and Consulate General of Czech Republic in Istanbul.
If all required documentation is in order, Short Terms Visa Applications are
                          usually processed within 15 calendar days, excluding day of submission at Visa
                          Application Centre, and number of days (1-2) required for transportation of
                          documents to Ankara (from Izmir and Antalya). 
To the attention of the applicants who submitt in Istanbul,
 It is not recommended to apply before 15 days from travel date since your visa
                          process probably would not be concluded!
Please note, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer than
                          mentioned period. We advice you to apply for visa well in advance.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases. 
Processing time for nationalities mentioned below is considerably longer,
                          approximately 14 working days due to additional internal procedures requirement:
                          Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Congo (Democratic Republic), Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana,
                          Iraq, Iran, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka and Syria.
Please note that applicants may be required to appear before a Visa Officer for a
                          personal interview at the Embassy of the Czech Republic, Ankara or Consulate
                          General, Istanbul prior to a decision being taken on the application. 
The Embassy of the Czech Republic and the Consulate General in Istanbul of the
                          Czech Republic also reserves the right to ask for additional supporting documents
                          during the visa application process in progress. Applicants are requested to read
                          the information on this site carefully. The guidelines listed on this site are to
                          help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. This will reduce the
                          chances of your application being incomplete or a delay in being processed.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
 A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Czech Republic for a
                          limited period of time. This category of visa caters for drivers conducting
                          international cargo and passenger transportation services to Czech Republic in
                          vehicles registered in Turkey.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Czech Republic for a
                          limited period of time. This category of visa caters for drivers conducting
                          international cargo and passenger transportation services to Czech Republic in
                          vehicles registered in Turkey.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Drivers Visa]
- There is a VFS Service fee of 29 € (inclusive of %20 VAT) levied per application over and above visa fees.
- Important Note : Visa Application Centers do not accept payments with 500 Euros banknotes.

## Additional Charges

[Table: Drivers Visa]

Please Note :
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- All charges are to be paid in specified currency and cash only.

## Documents Required
For Ankara Region (Antalya, Ankara), please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view checklist for Ankara region.
In addition to the Ankara Region checklist, please fill out the forms below.
Questionaire Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2AEDdBVr3kJeTgwhtfUWEk/80eea48df8a01c379f4edc5b05a3deca/Questionaire-Form.pdf) 
C-ACCOMMODATION Formu (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5MUGm7TSGIf0DYpbXOOTQH/8052e13af186b96778025828c9ac7e0f/New-C-ACCOMMODATION.pdf)
C-PNR (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/13hNiWhKUVpxzXy24HqlG4/c01b6354f0052c2c9a7cc05407e15806/New-C-PNR.pdf)
Daily Schedule 1 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ngA2IPzFp9PLN5eBa8rpl/a2cd20afdd23854ecfb6fcd00716895e/New_C_Daily_Schedule.pdf)
C-Non Eu Schengen (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5DAiyiWW0U31mCssoY749b/1d89046afd26f06fdd48f30257f03d11/C-NON-EU-SCHENGEN.pdf)
Interview Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64H3cVXkvJgoRkrdva9N8z/b61add67ed2e044a97be5241943d7c92/interview-form-mandatory_english.pdf)
For Istanbul, Izmir please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view the Istanbul, Izmir Checklist.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                            -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
The processing time of visa applications are in discretions of Embassy of Czech
                          Republic in Ankara and Consulate General of Czech Republic in Istanbul.
If all required documentation is in order, Short Terms Visa Applications are
                          usually processed within 15 calendar days, excluding day of submission at Visa
                          Application Centre, and number of days (1-2) required for transportation of
                          documents to Ankara (from Izmir and Antalya). 
To the attention of the applicants who submitt in Istanbul,
 It is not recommended to apply before 15 days from travel date since your visa
                          process probably would not be concluded!
Please note, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer than
                          mentioned period. We advice you to apply for visa well in advance.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases. 
Processing time for nationalities mentioned below is considerably longer,
                          approximately 14 working days due to additional internal procedures requirement:
                          Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Congo (Democratic Republic), Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana,
                          Iraq, Iran, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka and Syria.
Please note that applicants may be required to appear before a Visa Officer for a
                          personal interview at the Embassy of the Czech Republic, Ankara or Consulate
                          General, Istanbul prior to a decision being taken on the application. 
The Embassy of the Czech Republic and the Consulate General in Istanbul of the
                          Czech Republic also reserves the right to ask for additional supporting documents
                          during the visa application process in progress. Applicants are requested to read
                          the information on this site carefully. The guidelines listed on this site are to
                          help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. This will reduce the
                          chances of your application being incomplete or a delay in being processed. 

## Download Form
Please use below forms for Ankara Jurisdiction
Schengen Visa Application Form-English (Form must be filled in English)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech
Questionaire (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/XvSjFoH7W3ZQYHKi2bBGT/515d10ebc159409685eb253293d934cc/czech-questionnaire-eng-feb.pdf) (It must be filled personally and added into each application)
Please use below forms for Istanbul Jurisdiction
Schengen Visa Application Form-English ( For Czech Consulate of Istanbul jurisdiction, manually filled forms will not be accepted. Application froms must be filled by using a PC)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech ( For Czech Consulate of Istanbul jurisdiction, manually filled forms will not be accepted. Application froms must be filled by using a PC)
Questionaire (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/XvSjFoH7W3ZQYHKi2bBGT/515d10ebc159409685eb253293d934cc/czech-questionnaire-eng-feb.pdf) (It must be filled personally and added into each application)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
VISA PROCEDURE FOR FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS 
No Visa Fee
By the decision of the Czech Republic Consulate in Istanbul, Couple who are EU citizens and traveling together and have a Turkish passport will be able to apply through VFS Global.
EU family members traveling alone can apply to VFS Global branches.
If an EU citizen (not a Czech citizen/has no Czech residence) wants to travel to the Czechia with his/her spouse, who is a citizen of a third country, for the purpose of tourism, the Directive of EU does not apply and it is necessary to apply for a standard Schengen visa (all requested document must be present and pay all fees), not under the regime of a family member of an EU citizen.
Furthermore; If an EU citizen (not a Czech citizen/has Czech residence) wants to travel to the Czechia with his/her spouse, who is a citizen of a third country, for the purpose of tourism, the Directive of EU does apply under the regime of a family member of an EU citizen.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
VISA PROCEDURE FOR FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS 
No Visa Fee
By the decision of the Czech Republic Consulate in Istanbul, Couple who are EU citizens and traveling together and have a Turkish passport will be able to apply through VFS Global.
EU family members traveling alone can apply to VFS Global branches.
If an EU citizen (not a Czech citizen/has no Czech residence) wants to travel to the Czechia with his/her spouse, who is a citizen of a third country, for the purpose of tourism, the Directive of EU does not apply and it is necessary to apply for a standard Schengen visa (all requested document must be present and pay all fees), not under the regime of a family member of an EU citizen.
Furthermore; If an EU citizen (not a Czech citizen/has Czech residence) wants to travel to the Czechia with his/her spouse, who is a citizen of a third country, for the purpose of tourism, the Directive of EU does apply under the regime of a family member of an EU citizen.

## Visa Fees

[Table: FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS]
There is a VFS Service fee of 29 € (inclusive of %20 VAT) levied per application over and above visa fees.
Important Note : Visa Application Centers do not accept payments with 500 Euros banknotes.

## Additional Charges

[Table: FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS]

Please Note :
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- All charges are to be paid in specified currency and cash only.

## Documents Required
For Ankara Region (Antalya, Ankara), please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view checklist for Ankara region.
C-PNR (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/13hNiWhKUVpxzXy24HqlG4/c01b6354f0052c2c9a7cc05407e15806/New-C-PNR.pdf)
Daily Schedule 1 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ngA2IPzFp9PLN5eBa8rpl/a2cd20afdd23854ecfb6fcd00716895e/New_C_Daily_Schedule.pdf)
C-Non Eu Schengen (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5DAiyiWW0U31mCssoY749b/1d89046afd26f06fdd48f30257f03d11/C-NON-EU-SCHENGEN.pdf)
Interview Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64H3cVXkvJgoRkrdva9N8z/b61add67ed2e044a97be5241943d7c92/interview-form-mandatory_english.pdf)
For Istanbul, Izmir please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view the Istanbul, Izmir Checklist.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                            -80%
                            of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
The processing time of visa applications are in discretions of Embassy of Czech
                          Republic in Ankara and Consulate General of Czech Republic in Istanbul.
If all required documentation is in order, Short Terms Visa Applications are
                          usually
                          processed within 15 calendar days, excluding day of submission at Visa Application
                          Centre, and number of days (1-2) required for transportation of documents to Ankara
                          (from Izmir and Antalya). 
To the attention of the applicants who submitt in Istanbul,
 It is not recommended to apply before 15 days from travel date since your visa
                          process probably would not be concluded!
Please note, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer than
                          mentioned
                          period. We advice you to apply for visa well in advance.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases. 
Processing time for nationalities mentioned below is considerably longer,
                          approximately 14 working days due to additional internal procedures requirement:
                          Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Congo (Democratic Republic), Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana,
                          Iraq,
                          Iran, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka and Syria.
Please note that applicants may be required to appear before a Visa Officer for a
                          personal interview at the Embassy of the Czech Republic, Ankara or Consulate
                          General,
                          Istanbul prior to a decision being taken on the application. 
The Embassy of the Czech Republic and the Consulate General in Istanbul of the
                          Czech
                          Republic also reserves the right to ask for additional supporting documents during
                          the
                          visa application process in progress. Applicants are requested to read the
                          information
                          on this site carefully. The guidelines listed on this site are to help you prepare
                          your documents as accurately as possible. This will reduce the chances of your
                          application being incomplete or a delay in being processed. 

## Download Form
Please use below forms for Ankara Jurisdiction
Schengen Visa Application Form-English (Form must be filled in English)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech
Questionaire (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/XvSjFoH7W3ZQYHKi2bBGT/515d10ebc159409685eb253293d934cc/czech-questionnaire-eng-feb.pdf) (It must be filled personally and added into each application)
Interview Form for Ankara-İzmir-Antalya Applications (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/IKZxMhVXtMLmDSNChiRUD/99af4f906be4c5dbcf836d4d7bef7fcc/auto-question-aire-business.pdf)
DOCUMENTS FOR FAMILY MEMBER OF EU CITIZENS (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2OF9wv6BZzuwc20bmZvK5E/1fbe87aca960a2787cd4d7380153bf71/eu-form-for-vfs.pdf)
Please use below forms for Istanbul Jurisdiction
Schengen Visa Application Form-English ( For Czech Consulate of Istanbul jurisdiction, manually filled forms will not be accepted. Application froms must be filled by using a PC)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech ( For Czech Consulate of Istanbul jurisdiction, manually filled forms will not be accepted. Application froms must be filled by using a PC)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa type is granted for people want to go to Czech Republic for Study.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa type is granted for people want to go to Czech Republic for Study.

## Visa Fees

[Table: STUDENT]
- There is a VFS Service fee of 29 € (inclusive of %20 VAT) levied per application over and above visa fees.
- Important Note : Visa Application Centers do not accept payments with 500 Euros banknotes.

## Additional Charges

[Table: STUDENT]

Please Note :

- All charges are to be paid in specified currency and cash only.

## Documents Required
For Ankara Region (Antalya, Ankara), please use the checklist below.

visa_types.name: Territorial jurisdiction
visa_types.overview:
Applications from applicants residing in the cities listed below are accepted at the Ankara Visa Application Center. 
Adana, Adıyaman, Afyonkarahisar, Ağrı, Aksaray, Amasya, Ankara, Antalya, Ardahan, Artvin, Bartın, Batman, Bayburt, Bingöl, Bitlis, Bolu, Burdur, Çankırı, Çorum, Diyarbakır, Düzce, Elazığ, Erzincan, Erzurum, Eskişehir, Gaziantep, Giresun, Gümüşhane, Hakkâri, Hatay, Iğdır, Isparta, Kahramanmaraş, Karabük, Karaman, Kars, Kastamonu, Kayseri, Kilis, Kırıkkale, Kırşehir, Konya, Malatya, Mardin, Mersin, Muş, Nevşehir, Niğde, Ordu, Osmaniye, Rize, Samsun, Şanlıurfa, Siirt, Sinop, Şırnak, Sivas, Tokat, Trabzon, Tunceli, Van, Yozgat, and Zonguldak. 
Applications from prospective applicants residing in all other cities are accepted at the Istanbul Beyoğlu, Istanbul Altunizade, and Izmir Visa Application Centers.
visa_types.full_text:
Applications from applicants residing in the cities listed below are accepted at the Ankara Visa Application Center. 
Adana, Adıyaman, Afyonkarahisar, Ağrı, Aksaray, Amasya, Ankara, Antalya, Ardahan, Artvin, Bartın, Batman, Bayburt, Bingöl, Bitlis, Bolu, Burdur, Çankırı, Çorum, Diyarbakır, Düzce, Elazığ, Erzincan, Erzurum, Eskişehir, Gaziantep, Giresun, Gümüşhane, Hakkâri, Hatay, Iğdır, Isparta, Kahramanmaraş, Karabük, Karaman, Kars, Kastamonu, Kayseri, Kilis, Kırıkkale, Kırşehir, Konya, Malatya, Mardin, Mersin, Muş, Nevşehir, Niğde, Ordu, Osmaniye, Rize, Samsun, Şanlıurfa, Siirt, Sinop, Şırnak, Sivas, Tokat, Trabzon, Tunceli, Van, Yozgat, and Zonguldak. 
Applications from prospective applicants residing in all other cities are accepted at the Istanbul Beyoğlu, Istanbul Altunizade, and Izmir Visa Application Centers.

visa_types.documents_required:
For Ankara Region (Antalya, Ankara), please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view checklist for Ankara region. 
In addition to the Ankara Region checklist, please fill out the forms below.
C-ACCOMMODATION Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5MUGm7TSGIf0DYpbXOOTQH/8052e13af186b96778025828c9ac7e0f/New-C-ACCOMMODATION.pdf)
C-PNR (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/13hNiWhKUVpxzXy24HqlG4/c01b6354f0052c2c9a7cc05407e15806/New-C-PNR.pdf)

Daily Schedule 1 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ngA2IPzFp9PLN5eBa8rpl/a2cd20afdd23854ecfb6fcd00716895e/New_C_Daily_Schedule.pdf)
C-Non Eu Schengen (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5DAiyiWW0U31mCssoY749b/1d89046afd26f06fdd48f30257f03d11/C-NON-EU-SCHENGEN.pdf)
Interview Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64H3cVXkvJgoRkrdva9N8z/b61add67ed2e044a97be5241943d7c92/interview-form-mandatory_english.pdf)
For Istanbul, Izmir please use the checklist below.

visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table: Tourism]
- There is a VFS Service fee of 29 € (inclusive of %20 VAT) levied per application over and above visa fees.
- Important Note : Visa Application Centers do not accept payments with 500 Euros banknotes.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time of visa applications are in discretions of Embassy of Czech
                          Republic in Ankara and Consulate General of Czech Republic in Istanbul.
If all required documentation is in order, Short Terms Visa Applications are
                          usually processed within 15 calendar days, excluding day of submission at Visa
                          Application Centre, and number of days (1-2) required for transportation of
                          documents to Ankara (from Izmir and Antalya). 
To the attention of the applicants who submitt in Istanbul,
 It is not recommended to apply before 15 days from travel date since your visa
                          process probably would not be concluded!
Please note, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer than
                          mentioned period. We advice you to apply for visa well in advance.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases.
Processing time for nationalities mentioned below is considerably longer,
                          approximately 14 working days due to additional internal procedures requirement:
                          Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Congo (Democratic Republic), Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana,
                          Iraq, Iran, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka and Syria.
Please note that applicants may be required to appear before a Visa Officer for a
                          personal interview at the Embassy of the Czech Republic, Ankara or Consulate
                          General, Istanbul prior to a decision being taken on the application. 
The Embassy of the Czech Republic and the Consulate General in Istanbul of the
                          Czech Republic also reserves the right to ask for additional supporting documents
                          during the visa application process in progress. Applicants are requested to read
                          the information on this site carefully. The guidelines listed on this site are to
                          help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. This will reduce the
                          chances of your application being incomplete or a delay in being processed.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Czech Republic
                          for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from an Czech Republic
                          referent.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Czech Republic
                          for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from an Czech Republic
                          referent.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Tourism]
- There is a VFS Service fee of 29 € (inclusive of %20 VAT) levied per application over and above visa fees.
- Important Note : Visa Application Centers do not accept payments with 500 Euros banknotes.

## Additional Charges

[Table: Tourism]

Please Note :
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- All charges are to be paid in specified currency and cash only.

## Documents Required
For Ankara Region (Antalya, Ankara), please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view checklist for Ankara region. 
In addition to the Ankara Region checklist, please fill out the forms below.
C-ACCOMMODATION Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5MUGm7TSGIf0DYpbXOOTQH/8052e13af186b96778025828c9ac7e0f/New-C-ACCOMMODATION.pdf)
C-PNR (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/13hNiWhKUVpxzXy24HqlG4/c01b6354f0052c2c9a7cc05407e15806/New-C-PNR.pdf)

Daily Schedule 1 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ngA2IPzFp9PLN5eBa8rpl/a2cd20afdd23854ecfb6fcd00716895e/New_C_Daily_Schedule.pdf)
C-Non Eu Schengen (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5DAiyiWW0U31mCssoY749b/1d89046afd26f06fdd48f30257f03d11/C-NON-EU-SCHENGEN.pdf)
Interview Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64H3cVXkvJgoRkrdva9N8z/b61add67ed2e044a97be5241943d7c92/interview-form-mandatory_english.pdf)
For Istanbul, Izmir please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view the Istanbul, Izmir Checklist.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                            -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
The processing time of visa applications are in discretions of Embassy of Czech
                          Republic in Ankara and Consulate General of Czech Republic in Istanbul.
If all required documentation is in order, Short Terms Visa Applications are
                          usually processed within 15 calendar days, excluding day of submission at Visa
                          Application Centre, and number of days (1-2) required for transportation of
                          documents to Ankara (from Izmir and Antalya). 
To the attention of the applicants who submitt in Istanbul,
 It is not recommended to apply before 15 days from travel date since your visa
                          process probably would not be concluded!
Please note, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer than
                          mentioned period. We advice you to apply for visa well in advance.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases.
Processing time for nationalities mentioned below is considerably longer,
                          approximately 14 working days due to additional internal procedures requirement:
                          Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Congo (Democratic Republic), Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana,
                          Iraq, Iran, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka and Syria.
Please note that applicants may be required to appear before a Visa Officer for a
                          personal interview at the Embassy of the Czech Republic, Ankara or Consulate
                          General, Istanbul prior to a decision being taken on the application. 
The Embassy of the Czech Republic and the Consulate General in Istanbul of the
                          Czech Republic also reserves the right to ask for additional supporting documents
                          during the visa application process in progress. Applicants are requested to read
                          the information on this site carefully. The guidelines listed on this site are to
                          help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. This will reduce the
                          chances of your application being incomplete or a delay in being processed. 

## Download Form
Please use below forms for Ankara Jurisdiction
Schengen Visa Application Form-English (Form must be filled in English)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech
Questionaire (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/XvSjFoH7W3ZQYHKi2bBGT/515d10ebc159409685eb253293d934cc/czech-questionnaire-eng-feb.pdf) (It must be filled personally and added into each application)
Sample Application Form with Explanation (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6frDHvGZ5Vrs7Ky8HjFIXA/3f0ff94d6a8becc4f1940912637f464c/sample_form_201215.pdf)
Information (Please fill 2 copies)
Please use below forms for Istanbul Jurisdiction
Schengen Visa Application Form-English ( For Czech Consulate of Istanbul jurisdiction, manually filled forms will not be accepted. Application froms must be filled by using a PC)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech ( For Czech Consulate of Istanbul jurisdiction, manually filled forms will not be accepted. Application froms must be filled by using a PC)
Questionaire (It must be filled personally and added into each application)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa type is granted for people want to go to Czech Republic for Cultural or
                          Scientific or Artistic Events.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Czech Republic for business
                            or conference meetings.
visa_types.full_text:

                            or conference meetings.

Schengen Visa Application Form-English (Form must be filled in English)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech

visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table: Visit To Family Or Friends]
- There is a VFS Service fee of 29 € (inclusive of %20 VAT) levied per application over and above visa fees.
- Important Note : Visa Application Centers do not accept payments with 500 Euros banknotes.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time of visa applications are in discretions of Embassy of Czech
                          Republic in Ankara and Consulate General of Czech Republic in Istanbul.
If all required documentation is in order, Short Terms Visa Applications are
                          usually processed within 15 calendar days, excluding day of submission at Visa
                          Application Centre, and number of days (1-2) required for transportation of
                          documents to Ankara (from Izmir and Antalya). 
To the attention of the applicants who submitt in Istanbul,
 It is not recommended to apply before 15 days from travel date since your visa
                          process probably would not be concluded!
Please note, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer than
                          mentioned period. We advice you to apply for visa well in advance.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases. 
Processing time for nationalities mentioned below is considerably longer,
                          approximately 14 working days due to additional internal procedures requirement:
                          Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Congo (Democratic Republic), Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana,
                          Iraq, Iran, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka and Syria.
Please note that applicants may be required to appear before a Visa Officer for a
                          personal interview at the Embassy of the Czech Republic, Ankara or Consulate
                          General, Istanbul prior to a decision being taken on the application. 
The Embassy of the Czech Republic and the Consulate General in Istanbul of the
                          Czech Republic also reserves the right to ask for additional supporting documents
                          during the visa application process in progress. Applicants are requested to read
                          the information on this site carefully. The guidelines listed on this site are to
                          help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. This will reduce the
                          chances of your application being incomplete or a delay in being processed.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visit to Family or Freinds visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to
                          visit Czech Republic for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for
                          people wishing visit the member of his/her family or friend.
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visit to Family or Freinds visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to
                          visit Czech Republic for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for
                          people wishing visit the member of his/her family or friend.
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Visit To Family Or Friends]
- There is a VFS Service fee of 29 € (inclusive of %20 VAT) levied per application over and above visa fees.
- Important Note : Visa Application Centers do not accept payments with 500 Euros banknotes.

## Additional Charges

[Table: Visit To Family Or Friends]

Please Note :
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- All charges are to be paid in specified currency and cash only.

## Documents Required
For Ankara Region (Antalya, Ankara), please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view checklist for Ankara region.
Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4nLZN0s25svUdt8MijV5EW/742c93272e6e84fc47d24a47ac7490ae/unmarried_checklist.pdf) to view checklist for Ankara region.(Unmarried Couples)
In addition to the Ankara Region checklist, please fill out the forms below.
C-PNR (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/13hNiWhKUVpxzXy24HqlG4/c01b6354f0052c2c9a7cc05407e15806/New-C-PNR.pdf)
Daily Schedule 1 (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ngA2IPzFp9PLN5eBa8rpl/a2cd20afdd23854ecfb6fcd00716895e/New_C_Daily_Schedule.pdf)
C-Non Eu Schengen (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5DAiyiWW0U31mCssoY749b/1d89046afd26f06fdd48f30257f03d11/C-NON-EU-SCHENGEN.pdf)
Interview Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/64H3cVXkvJgoRkrdva9N8z/b61add67ed2e044a97be5241943d7c92/interview-form-mandatory_english.pdf)
For Istanbul, Izmir please use the checklist below.
Please click here to view the Istanbul, Izmir Checklist.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70
                            -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
The processing time of visa applications are in discretions of Embassy of Czech
                          Republic in Ankara and Consulate General of Czech Republic in Istanbul.
If all required documentation is in order, Short Terms Visa Applications are
                          usually processed within 15 calendar days, excluding day of submission at Visa
                          Application Centre, and number of days (1-2) required for transportation of
                          documents to Ankara (from Izmir and Antalya). 
To the attention of the applicants who submitt in Istanbul,
 It is not recommended to apply before 15 days from travel date since your visa
                          process probably would not be concluded!
Please note, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer than
                          mentioned period. We advice you to apply for visa well in advance.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases. 
Processing time for nationalities mentioned below is considerably longer,
                          approximately 14 working days due to additional internal procedures requirement:
                          Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Congo (Democratic Republic), Eritrea, Ethiopia, Ghana,
                          Iraq, Iran, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Sri Lanka and Syria.
Please note that applicants may be required to appear before a Visa Officer for a
                          personal interview at the Embassy of the Czech Republic, Ankara or Consulate
                          General, Istanbul prior to a decision being taken on the application. 
The Embassy of the Czech Republic and the Consulate General in Istanbul of the
                          Czech Republic also reserves the right to ask for additional supporting documents
                          during the visa application process in progress. Applicants are requested to read
                          the information on this site carefully. The guidelines listed on this site are to
                          help you prepare your documents as accurately as possible. This will reduce the
                          chances of your application being incomplete or a delay in being processed. 

## Download Form
Please use below forms for Ankara Jurisdiction
Schengen Visa Application Form-English (Form must be filled in English)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech
Questionaire (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/XvSjFoH7W3ZQYHKi2bBGT/515d10ebc159409685eb253293d934cc/czech-questionnaire-eng-feb.pdf) (It must be filled personally and added into each application)
Please use below forms for Istanbul Jurisdiction
Schengen Visa Application Form-English ( For Czech Consulate of Istanbul jurisdiction, manually filled forms will not be accepted. Application froms must be filled by using a PC)
Schengen Visa Application Form-Czech ( For Czech Consulate of Istanbul jurisdiction, manually filled forms will not be accepted. Application froms must be filled by using a PC)
Questionaire (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/XvSjFoH7W3ZQYHKi2bBGT/515d10ebc159409685eb253293d934cc/czech-questionnaire-eng-feb.pdf) (It must be filled personally and added into each application)
